## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory meeting between Marcel Santilli (GrowthX) and Hunter Walk (Homebrew) to explore potential collaboration and investment opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/LyzsgPxDRacdcBePUn9rZvZwE4UkB5Pz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Homebrew: Unique VC model focused on early-stage investments, now self-funded for increased flexibility](https://fathom.video/share/LyzsgPxDRacdcBePUn9rZvZwE4UkB5Pz?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [GrowthX: AI-powered content creation platform evolving from agency roots to scalable SaaS infrastructure](https://fathom.video/share/LyzsgPxDRacdcBePUn9rZvZwE4UkB5Pz?tab=summary&timestamp=13.0)
  - [Mutual interest in exploring collaboration, with potential for Series A discussions in the future](https://fathom.video/share/LyzsgPxDRacdcBePUn9rZvZwE4UkB5Pz?tab=summary&timestamp=506.0)
  - [Both companies emphasize relationship-building and value-driven approaches in their respective fields](https://fathom.video/share/LyzsgPxDRacdcBePUn9rZvZwE4UkB5Pz?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)

## Topics

### Homebrew's Unique VC Model

  - [Founded by Hunter Walk and Satya Patel after Google/YouTube experiences](https://fathom.video/share/LyzsgPxDRacdcBePUn9rZvZwE4UkB5Pz?tab=summary&timestamp=91.0)
  - [10-year track record with 3 successful funds from endowments/foundations](https://fathom.video/share/LyzsgPxDRacdcBePUn9rZvZwE4UkB5Pz?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)
  - [Now self-funded (Fund 4) for increased flexibility in deal structures](https://fathom.video/share/LyzsgPxDRacdcBePUn9rZvZwE4UkB5Pz?tab=summary&timestamp=266.0)
  - [Focus: 10-15 investments/year, primarily seed/pre-seed ($100K-$500K)](https://fathom.video/share/LyzsgPxDRacdcBePUn9rZvZwE4UkB5Pz?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Philosophy: Aligned with founders, offering diverse "tools" beyond just capital](https://fathom.video/share/LyzsgPxDRacdcBePUn9rZvZwE4UkB5Pz?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)

### GrowthX's Evolution and Approach

  - [Marcel's background: Content marketing innovation at IBM, HP, HashiCorp, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/LyzsgPxDRacdcBePUn9rZvZwE4UkB5Pz?tab=summary&timestamp=561.0)
  - [Transition from traditional marketing to "publisher" mindset for brands](https://fathom.video/share/LyzsgPxDRacdcBePUn9rZvZwE4UkB5Pz?tab=summary&timestamp=568.0)
  - [Development of AI-powered content workflows at DeepGram](https://fathom.video/share/LyzsgPxDRacdcBePUn9rZvZwE4UkB5Pz?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)
  - [Launch of GrowthX: Initially workshops, then full-service content creation](https://fathom.video/share/LyzsgPxDRacdcBePUn9rZvZwE4UkB5Pz?tab=summary&timestamp=852.0)
  - [Current offering: AI-driven content strategy and production ($9K-$60K/month)](https://fathom.video/share/LyzsgPxDRacdcBePUn9rZvZwE4UkB5Pz?tab=summary&timestamp=1705.0)
  - [Technology: Custom-built AI workflow engine with human expert oversight](https://fathom.video/share/LyzsgPxDRacdcBePUn9rZvZwE4UkB5Pz?tab=summary&timestamp=1296.0)

### GrowthX's Technical Infrastructure

  - [Coding agent creates workflows from high-level plans](https://fathom.video/share/LyzsgPxDRacdcBePUn9rZvZwE4UkB5Pz?tab=summary&timestamp=1297.0)
  - [Runtime layer executes complex, multi-step content processes](https://fathom.video/share/LyzsgPxDRacdcBePUn9rZvZwE4UkB5Pz?tab=summary&timestamp=1326.0)
  - [Human experts guide and refine AI outputs](https://fathom.video/share/LyzsgPxDRacdcBePUn9rZvZwE4UkB5Pz?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [Developing Task Hub and Learn Engine for optimization and feedback loops](https://fathom.video/share/LyzsgPxDRacdcBePUn9rZvZwE4UkB5Pz?tab=summary&timestamp=1485.0)

### Client Engagement Model

  - [Initial 8-week strategy sprint to create foundational "artifacts"](https://fathom.video/share/LyzsgPxDRacdcBePUn9rZvZwE4UkB5Pz?tab=summary&timestamp=1721.0)
  - [Ongoing monthly retainer on annual contracts](https://fathom.video/share/LyzsgPxDRacdcBePUn9rZvZwE4UkB5Pz?tab=summary&timestamp=1717.0)
  - [Customized content delivery (articles, newsletters, programmatic pages)](https://fathom.video/share/LyzsgPxDRacdcBePUn9rZvZwE4UkB5Pz?tab=summary&timestamp=1750.0)
  - [Plans to offer client access to platform for direct interaction](https://fathom.video/share/LyzsgPxDRacdcBePUn9rZvZwE4UkB5Pz?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)

### Future Directions and Potential Collaboration

  - [GrowthX considering Series A funding round](https://fathom.video/share/LyzsgPxDRacdcBePUn9rZvZwE4UkB5Pz?tab=summary&timestamp=1813.0)
  - [Mutual interest in deeper discussions and potential partnership](https://fathom.video/share/LyzsgPxDRacdcBePUn9rZvZwE4UkB5Pz?tab=summary&timestamp=1780.0)
  - [Marcel to provide updated Series A materials within a week](https://fathom.video/share/LyzsgPxDRacdcBePUn9rZvZwE4UkB5Pz?tab=summary&timestamp=1842.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to prepare and share updated Series A materials with Hunter](https://fathom.video/share/LyzsgPxDRacdcBePUn9rZvZwE4UkB5Pz?tab=summary&timestamp=1813.0)
  - [Hunter to brief Satya (Homebrew partner) on GrowthX opportunity](https://fathom.video/share/LyzsgPxDRacdcBePUn9rZvZwE4UkB5Pz?tab=summary&timestamp=1773.0)
  - [Potential follow-up meeting or coffee in San Francisco to explore collaboration further](https://fathom.video/share/LyzsgPxDRacdcBePUn9rZvZwE4UkB5Pz?tab=summary&timestamp=1832.0)
  - [Ongoing relationship-building and exploration of how Homebrew can support GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/LyzsgPxDRacdcBePUn9rZvZwE4UkB5Pz?tab=summary&timestamp=1780.0)
